nasb.text: But there was a strong tower in the center of the city, and all the men and women with all the leaders of the city fled there and shut themselves in; and they went up on the roof of the tower.

esv.text: But there was a strong tower within the city, and all the men and women and all the leaders of the city fled to it and shut themselves in, and they went up to the roof of the tower.

cnv.text: 城中有一座堅固的城樓；那城所有的人，無論男女，都逃到那裡去，關上門，上了樓頂。

ccb.text: 全城的人都逃进城中一座坚固的城楼内，锁上大门，爬上楼顶。
